message:
docs(wa-core): Add safety section documenting forbid(unsafe_code)

Document the existing #![forbid(unsafe_code)] attribute in the module-level
documentation for wa-core, making the safety guarantee more visible to users
and developers.

Part of wa-4vx.1.2 toolchain baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
